name: worth-try
description: Evaluate whether a company or job offer is worth taking, and compare offers with structured company research.

interface.longDescription: Assess whether a company or offer is worth taking with a structured scorecard, public-company financial checks, startup funding research, internship versus full-time logic, red flags, negotiation levers, and follow-up questions.
defaultPrompt: Use Worth Try to evaluate this job offer.
Use Worth Try to compare these internship offers.
Use Worth Try to assess whether this startup is worth joining.
